question_sentence: The president of which country faces calls for impeachment over a scandal dubbed ‘Farmgate’?
Which men’s golf major championship will be played this week at the Aronimink club outside Philadelphia?
Which filmmaker received a lifetime achievement award during the opening ceremony at the 79th Cannes Film Festival this week?
The Princess of Wales has returned to international duties with a visit to which European country?
Who did Fifa announce as the featured performers at the men’s football World Cup final’s first-ever half-time show this summer?
choices: Bruce Springsteen, Beyoncé and Chris Martin
Paul McCartney, Bad Bunny and Justin Bieber

question_sentence: Which actor was caught up in a road rage incident with a fellow cyclist in London?
Xi Jinping and Donald Trump enjoyed a guided tour of which historical site on day one of the US president’s state visit to China?
Teaching staff at which US university voted this week to change a 133-year-old tradition that let students take exams without invigilators?
Which 1980s pop idol made a guest appearance for San Marino’s Eurovision semi-final performance?
10. A minister in which West African country has vanished after being sentenced to 75 years in prison for money laundering?
Which country hosted President Donald Trump this week for a lavish state visit?
evidence: Chinese leader Xi Jinping and President Trump met for a high-stakes summit in Beijing. Trade, Taiwan and the war in Iran all dominated the agenda.

question_sentence: At least 16 Americans aboard a hantavirus-stricken cruise ship arrived in the US this week. Most were quarantined in which state?
evidence: Several passengers were evaluated for hantavirus at a biocontainment unit in Nebraska. Some who tested negative for the virus were later moved out.

question_sentence: How much has the war in Iran cost Americans so far?
evidence: The Pentagon says the cost of the war in Iran is $29 billion, a figure that's higher than the $25 billion price tag it issued to Congress roughly two weeks ago.

question_sentence: Excitement is building for the 2026 World Cup. Where will the championship match take place?
evidence: The 2026 World Cup final at New Jersey’s MetLife Stadium is expected to draw millions of viewers worldwide. But soaring ticket prices are sparking controversy, with some seats for the final match now listed at nearly $33,000.

question_sentence: A lawsuit was filed Monday to block the Trump administration from painting which iconic Washington, DC, landmark?
evidence: A lawsuit was filed to block the Trump administration from painting the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool blue as crews cover its longtime gray color.

question_sentence: Which health condition that impacts millions of women worldwide is being renamed?
evidence: Polycystic ovary syndrome, or PCOS, is getting a new name that researchers hope can provide more clarity: polyendocrine metabolic ovarian syndrome, or PMOS.

question_sentence: Which of the following is the name of a controversial migrant detention facility in the Florida Everglades that is expected to close?
evidence: Florida is expected to wind down its controversial “Alligator Alcatraz” migrant detention facility sometime this summer, according to a source familiar with the planning.

question_sentence: Which automaker recently announced it lost money for the first time in 70 years?
evidence: The auto industry’s massive pullback from its electric vehicle plans has claimed another victim: Honda, which posted its first annual loss since 1955.

question_sentence: The average price of a gallon of regular gas in the US is approaching what eye-popping threshold?
evidence: Gas prices have spiked from a national average of $2.98 a gallon when the war with Iran started to $4.56 a gallon last week, according to AAA.

question_sentence: Which prestigious film festival recently got underway?
evidence: The Cannes Film Festival is underway on the French Riviera, drawing some of the biggest names in film and fashion.
